name: Jamaican Hot Wings
recipeInstructions:
NOTE: Jamaican jerk spice may be found in specialty food stores.
1. Melt the butter in a 2-quart sauce pot over low heat.
2. Add the jerk spice, Tabasco sauce, and tomato juice to the melted butter. Blend well and set aside.
3. Rinse the chicken wings under cold running water and pat dry with paper towels.
4. Dust each wing with unbleached flour.
5. Deep fry the wings in a heavy pot or skillet with about 2 inches of hot oil until they are cooked through.
6. Remove the wings from the oil and place them in the sauce mixture. Allow to marinate for just a few minutes.
7. Drain any excess liquid before serving.
Makes 40 to 50 Wings
